title: Malaysian Curry Potato Casserole
description: A unique casserole that combines the flavors of Malaysian curry with the comfort of mashed potatoes. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Boil the potatoes in salted water until tender. Drain and mash.
In a pan, heat some oil and sauté the curry powder for 1 minute.
Add the fermented fish paste (if using) and cook for another minute.
Add the heavy cream and stir until heated through.
Combine the mashed potatoes and curry sauce. Mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheese (if desired).
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh herbs (if desired).
